<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Controller; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request; use Symfony\Component\Stopwatch\Stopwatch; /** * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class TraceableArgumentResolver implements ArgumentResolverInterface { public function __construct( private ArgumentResolverInterface $resolver, private Stopwatch $stopwatch, ) { } public function getArguments(Request $request, callable $controller, ?\ReflectionFunctionAbstract $reflector = null): array { $e = $this->stopwatch->start('controller.get_arguments'); try { return $this->resolver->getArguments($request, $controller, $reflector); } finally { $e->stop(); } } }
